notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8. It addresses 17 CVEs: CVE-2023-53297, CVE-2023-52525, CVE-2025-38461, CVE-2023-53226, CVE-2025-37797, and 12 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
